name: core.openwop.triggers
description: Workflow-trigger pack. Seven entry-point shapes — webhook, schedule, event, envelope, chatMessage, canvas, artifact — that hosts use to register workflows for external-event-driven dispatch. Trigger nodes are pass-through executors: they forward `ctx.triggerData` (set by the engine when the trigger fires) to outputs. The pack contributes the typed config + payload schemas + the runtime pass-through.
author: OpenWOP Working Group
